sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { getStoredPatient, patientLogout } from '../services/patientAuth'; import './PatientDashboardPage.css'; const PatientDashboardPage = () => { const [patient, setPatient] = useState(null); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const currentPatient = getStoredPatient(); if (!currentPatient) { navigate('/patient/auth'); } else { setPatient(currentPatient); } }, [navigate]); const handleLogout = () => { patientLogout(); navigate('/patient/auth'); }; if (!patient) { return (

Loading dashboard...

); } return (
{/* Sidebar */}

MediCare

Patient Portal

{patient.profileImage ? ( ) : ( )}

{patient.name}

ID: {patient.id}

{/* Main Content */}

Welcome back, {patient.name}!

{new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}

{activeTab === 'overview' && (

Next Appointment

No upcoming

Active Prescriptions

{patient.currentMedications?.length || 0}

Medical Records

{patient.medicalHistory?.length || 0}

Primary Doctor

Dr. John Smith

Recent Medical Records

{patient.medicalHistory && patient.medicalHistory.length > 0 ? (
{patient.medicalHistory.map((record, index) => (

{record.condition}

Diagnosed: {record.diagnosedDate}

{record.notes}

))}
) : (

No medical records found

)}
)} {activeTab === 'profile' && (

Personal Information

{patient?.profileImage ? ( ) : ( )}

{patient?.name}

Patient ID: {patient?.id}

{/* Personal Information */}

Personal Information

Full Name {patient?.name || 'Not provided'}
Email {patient?.email || 'Not provided'}
Phone {patient?.phone || 'Not provided'}
Date of Birth {patient?.dateOfBirth || 'Not provided'}
Gender {patient?.gender || 'Not provided'}
{/* Medical Information */}

Medical Information

Blood Group {patient?.bloodGroup || 'Not recorded'}
Height {patient?.height ? `${patient.height} cm` : 'Not recorded'}
Weight {patient?.weight ? `${patient.weight} kg` : 'Not recorded'}
Allergies {patient?.allergies?.length > 0 ? (Array.isArray(patient.allergies) ? patient.allergies.join(', ') : patient.allergies) : 'None recorded'}
Current Medications {patient?.currentMedications?.length > 0 ? (Array.isArray(patient.currentMedications) ? patient.currentMedications.join(', ') : patient.currentMedications) : 'None recorded'}
{/* Contact Information */}

Contact Information

Emergency Contact {patient?.emergencyContact || 'Not provided'}
Address {patient?.address || 'Not provided'}
{/* Insurance Information */} {(patient?.insuranceProvider || patient?.insuranceId) && (

Insurance Information

{patient?.insuranceProvider && (
Insurance Provider {patient.insuranceProvider}
)} {patient?.insuranceId && (
Insurance ID {patient.insuranceId}
)}
)}
)}
); }; export default PatientDashboardPage;
